evidence.snippet:
**To reach our headquarters:**
2345 Crystal Drive
Suite 1000
Arlington, Virginia 22202

As an innovative and agile defense technology company, we are uniquely positioned to deliver solutions as a prime contractor, a systems, sub-system, or a component level provider. With a dedicated and talented workforce, our platform-agnostic technologies are fielded on thousands of military platforms worldwide.

Today, our technologies keep our forces leaps ahead in capability over adversaries. We are a leading provider of electro-optical and infrared sensors for ground combat vehicles, soldier-based sensing capabilities including weapon sites and targeting systems, aircraft and vehicle protection systems, and tactical radar systems.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Supplies EO/IR sensors, targeting systems, tactical radars, and counter-UAS subsystems for military platforms. Explicitly positions as prime contractor, systems, sub-system, or component level provider.

tagline: ISR payloads, sensors, and navigation subsystems supplier—notably Apache targeting receivers (Arrowhead®), compact hemispheric radar (aCHR/eCHR), edge AI processors, and GPS-denied positioning (A-PNT). Production-ready across manned and unmanned platforms. NDAA compliance status and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on unmanned-systems integration remains limited despite broad sensor portfolio.
